title: Career Guidance Question Tree
description: A deep-branching question tree that narrows down career recommendations through thorough personal, academic, and preference-based questioning. Results only appear after sufficient narrowing.

Q1.question: What is your current or highest education level?

options.label: High School Student / No degree yet
Undergraduate (studying for or completed a Bachelor's)

Q_PERS1_HS.question: How would you describe your general personality at work or in projects?

options.label: I like solving complex problems and thinking analytically
I like creating, designing, or making things
I like helping, teaching, or supporting people
I like leading, organizing, and making decisions

Q_PERS2_HS_ANALYTICAL.question: What kind of work environment suits you best?

options.label: Outdoors or on-site (field, site, lab, clinic)
Remote or flexible — I work best independently
Mixed — I want variety in my environment

Q_PERS3_HS_ANALYTICAL_INDOOR.question: How important is financial reward vs. personal fulfillment in your career?

options.label: Primarily financial — I want to maximise earnings
Balanced — good pay and meaningful work
Fulfillment first — purpose matters more than pay

options.label: Client-facing — I enjoy working with the public
